name: 👤 Sweet Potato Curry
Keywords: main dinner lunch entree casserole stew chicken beef pork pasta
ingredients: 1 whole onion, half a tablespoon avocado oil, a couple of cloves garlic, ginger, sweet potatoes, carrots, broccoli, cauliflower, black pepper, a teaspoon turmeric, 2 cups vegetable stock, 1 cup quinoa, 2 limes, green beans, cilantro, peas, macadamia nutmilk
ingredients_json: [{"q": "", "i": "1 whole onion"}, {"q": "", "i": "half a tablespoon avocado oil"}, {"q": "", "i": "a couple of cloves garlic"}, {"q": "", "i": "ginger"}, {"q": "", "i": "sweet potatoes"}, {"q": "", "i": "carrots"}, {"q": "", "i": "broccoli"}, {"q": "", "i": "cauliflower"}, {"q": "", "i": "black pepper"}, {"q": "", "i": "a teaspoon turmeric"}, {"q": "", "i": "2 cups vegetable stock"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 cup quinoa"}, {"q": "", "i": "2 limes"}, {"q": "", "i": "green beans"}, {"q": "", "i": "cilantro"}, {"q": "", "i": "peas"}, {"q": "", "i": "macadamia nutmilk"}]
instructions: Step 1: Chop one whole onion into a fine dice. Step 2: Heat a medium stainless steel pot on medium-high heat and add half a tablespoon of avocado oil. Step 3: Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent. Step 4: Peel and chop ginger and garlic, and add to the pot. Step 5: Peel and chop sweet potatoes and carrots, and add to the pot. Step 6: Chop broccoli and cauliflower, and let them sit for 40 minutes. Step 7: Add black pepper and turmeric to the pot. Step 8: Add broccoli, cauliflower, and enough water to cover everything, and bring to a boil. Step 9: Cover the pot and let it simmer for 15 minutes. Step 10: Cook quinoa in a separate pot. Step 11: Add peas, green beans, cilantro, citrus juice, and macadamia nutmilk to the curry. Step 12: Plate the dish with quinoa, curry, and garnishes.

name: 👤 Buddha Bowl
ingredients: 1 Japanese Sweet Potato, 1/2 Head Of Asparagus, 5-6 Leaves Kale, 1 Red Pepper, 2 Carrots, 1/4 Cup Walnuts, Handful Of Cilantro, 1/2 Tsp Blueprint Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Handful Of Green Onions, Lemon, Handful Of Chopped Dill, 1/2 Cup White Beans, 1 Tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar, 1/2 Tsp Cumin Seeds
ingredients_json: [{"q": "", "i": "1 Japanese Sweet Potato"}, {"q": "", "i": "1/2 Head Of Asparagus"}, {"q": "", "i": "5-6 Leaves Kale"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 Red Pepper"}, {"q": "", "i": "2 Carrots"}, {"q": "", "i": "1/4 Cup Walnuts"}, {"q": "", "i": "Handful Of Cilantro"}, {"q": "", "i": "1/2 Tsp Blueprint Extra Virgin Olive Oil"}, {"q": "", "i": "Handful Of Green Onions"}, {"q": "", "i": "Lemon"}, {"q": "", "i": "Handful Of Chopped Dill"}, {"q": "", "i": "1/2 Cup White Beans"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 Tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar"}, {"q": "", "i": "1/2 Tsp Cumin Seeds"}]
instructions:
Poke a few holes in the sweet potato and slightly cover with Blueprint Extra Virgin Olive Oil. Roast the Japanese sweet potato for 45 minutes to 1 hour at 400°F. Once roasted, pull out of the oven, cut in half, and top with green onions and cilantro.
Roast the red pepper in the oven for 25–30 mins at 400°F. Thinly slice the pepper after roasting.
Trim off the woody ends of the asparagus and boil in 1–inch water in a large skillet for 2–5 minutes.
Rinse and drain the white beans. Top beans with juice of 1 lemon and a handful of chopped dill.
Shred the carrots and massage with apple cider vinegar and cumin seeds.
Chop the kale, add a splash of Extra Virgin Olive Oil, and massage kale with your hands until kale softens.
Assemble the bowl with the sweet potato, asparagus, red pepper, bean salad, kale, and shredded carrots. Top with toasted walnuts and a squeeze of lemon juice.

name: 👤 Super Veggie
ingredients: 150g cauliflower, 250g broccoli, 50g shitake or maake mushrooms, 1 clove garlic, 3g ginger, 150g cooked black lentils, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tspoon hemp seeds, 1 tbspoon apple cider vinegar, 1 tblspoon extra virgin olive oil
ingredients_json: [{"q": "", "i": "150g cauliflower"}, {"q": "", "i": "250g broccoli"}, {"q": "", "i": "50g shitake or maake mushrooms"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 clove garlic"}, {"q": "", "i": "3g ginger"}, {"q": "", "i": "150g cooked black lentils"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 tbsp cumin"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 tspoon hemp seeds"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 tbspoon apple cider vinegar"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 tblspoon extra virgin olive oil"}]
instructions:
Step 1: Chop cauliflower, broccoli, mushrooms, garlic, and ginger.
Step 2: Boil broccoli, cauliflower, and mushrooms for 7-9 minutes.
Step 3: Add boiled vegetables to 150g cooked black lentils.
Step 4: Add cumin, hemp seeds, ginger, garlic, apple cider vinegar, and olive oil.
Step 5: Blend with water for a smooth version or top with salt substitute for a chopped version.

name: 👤 Paella Valenciana
Keywords: main dinner lunch entree casserole stew chicken beef pork pasta
ingredients: chicken thighs, rabbit, artichoke, green beans, broad beans, saffron, olive oil, salt, garlic, smoked paprika, grated tomatoes, chicken stock, paella rice, rosemary
ingredients_json: [{"q": "", "i": "chicken thighs"}, {"q": "", "i": "rabbit"}, {"q": "", "i": "artichoke"}, {"q": "", "i": "green beans"}, {"q": "", "i": "broad beans"}, {"q": "", "i": "saffron"}, {"q": "", "i": "olive oil"}, {"q": "", "i": "salt"}, {"q": "", "i": "garlic"}, {"q": "", "i": "smoked paprika"}, {"q": "", "i": "grated tomatoes"}, {"q": "", "i": "chicken stock"}, {"q": "", "i": "paella rice"}, {"q": "", "i": "rosemary"}]
instructions:
Step 1: Heat the paella pan and prepare the saffron by toasting it.
Step 2: Add chicken and rabbit to the pan with salt and olive oil, and cook until browned.
Step 3: Add runner beans, broad beans, and artichoke to the pan and cook until browned.
Step 4: Add garlic, smoked paprika, and grated tomatoes to the pan and cook for a minute.
Step 5: Add chicken stock, saffron, and paella rice to the pan, and bring to a boil.
Step 6: Reduce heat and cook for 10 minutes, then lower heat and cook for another 6 minutes.
Step 7: Add rosemary and let it cook for 5 minutes on low heat, then rest for 5 minutes.

name: 👤 Creamy Korea Noodles
Keywords: main dinner lunch entree casserole stew chicken beef pork pasta user input
ingredients: 200g turkey breast, 1 p choy, 50g yellow onion, 15g red chili paste, 20g soy sauce, 10g honey, juice of half a lime, 50g light cream cheese, 1 clove garlic, 1 piece of ginger, 4g oil, 1 package udon noodles
ingredients_json: [{"q": "", "i": "200g turkey breast"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 p choy"}, {"q": "", "i": "50g yellow onion"}, {"q": "", "i": "15g red chili paste"}, {"q": "", "i": "20g soy sauce"}, {"q": "", "i": "10g honey"}, {"q": "", "i": "juice of half a lime"}, {"q": "", "i": "50g light cream cheese"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 clove garlic"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 piece of ginger"}, {"q": "", "i": "4g oil"}, {"q": "", "i": "1 package udon noodles"}]
instructions: Step 1: Cook the noodles by heating up a pot of water, add a pinch of salt, and as soon as the water starts to simmer, just add the noodles in, wait 1 minute, and then go in with tongs and give them a little shake. Step 2: Prepare the protein source by slicing 200g of turkey breast into fine strips. Step 3: Prepare the volume filler by washing and chopping 1 p choy and dicing half a yellow onion. Step 4: Prepare the sauce by combining 15g of red chili paste, 20g of soy sauce, 10g of honey, the juice of half a lime, and 50g of light cream cheese. Step 5: Heat up 4g of oil in a pan on medium heat and start with the p choy and the onions with a small pinch of salt. Step 6: Add another 2g of oil and go in with the turkey, making sure to spread all the meat around the pan so it can properly brown. Step 7: Add a pinch of salt and freshly cracked black pepper and let it sear for 1 minute and then give it a flip. Step 8: Add another gram of oil, then add the garlic and the ginger. Step 9: Give everything a good stir, then add back the cooked noodles along with the sauce. Step 10: Transfer everything into a big bowl and add half a sliced avocado on top if desired.

name: 👤 Chicken Teriyaki with Rice and Cucumber Salad
ingredients: 300g jasmine rice, 600g water, 2 pinches salt, 3 cucumbers, 2 pinches salt, 1000g chicken breast, 30g oil, 1.5 teaspoons garlic powder, 60g soy sauce, 25g rice vinegar, 25g honey, 40g soy sauce, 20g vinegar, 20g honey, 1 clove garlic, 6g sesame oil, chili flakes, sesame seeds, ginger
instructions:
Step 1: Chop the cucumbers and add salt to extract water.
Step 2: Cook the rice with salt and water.
Step 3: Prepare the chicken by slicing and seasoning with oil, garlic powder, and pepper.
Step 4: Cook the chicken in a pan and set aside.
Step 5: Prepare the teriyaki sauce with soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey, and add to the chicken.
Step 6: Prepare the cucumber salad dressing with soy sauce, vinegar, honey, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil.
Step 7: Combine the cooked chicken, rice, and cucumber salad in meal prep containers.

name: Cheesy Baked Pasta
ingredients: 400 g pasta, 250 g onions, 250 g carrots, 250 g celery, 2-3 cloves garlic, 1000 g ground beef, 28 g olive oil, 20 g tomato puree, 700 g pata, 500 g water, 25 g stock powder, 15 g dry gelatin, 100 g shredded mozzarella cheese, 50 g Parmesan cheese
instructions:
Step 1: Cook the pasta in salted water for 11 minutes until al dente.
Step 2: Prepare the sofrito by dicing onions, carrots, and celery into fine pieces and chopping garlic.
Step 3: Cook the sofrito in olive oil over medium heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Step 4: Add ground beef to the pan and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spatula.
Step 5: Add tomato puree, pata, water, stock powder, and dry gelatin to the pan and stir to combine.
Step 6: Simmer the sauce for 10 minutes with the lid on and 10 minutes with the lid off to reduce and intensify the flavors.
Step 7: Combine the cooked pasta and sauce in a baking dish and top with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Step 8: Place the dish under the broiler for 2 minutes to melt the cheese.
Step 9: Divide the pasta into portions and cool before storing in the fridge or freezer.

name: 15-MINUTE HIGH PROTEIN NOODLE RECIPE WITH TOFU
ingredients: 2 spring onions, chopped, 50g cooked broad beans, peas or edamame beans, 140g firm tofu, crumbled, 1tbs + 1 tsp tamari sauce, 1 tsp of vegetable oil for frying, a handful of spinach or spring greens, roughly chopped, 65g rice noodles, water for boiling, 3tbs teriyaki sauce, 1/2 tsp mirin, 1 tsp sesame oil, 2 tbs of sesame seeds, a handful of crushed peanuts, 1-2 tbs chilli flakes or chopped chillis
instructions:
Chop your spring onions, set aside.
Select and weigh your preferred legume, and set aside. If you’re using edamame or broad beans, make sure the shells/skins are removed. Including these will give your noodle dish a protein boost!
Press your tofu to remove the surplus liquid, then crumble it up so it resembles the texture of scrambled egg. You can do this by hand or by using a fork. Mix your tofu with your tamari sauce.
Next, place a non-stick frying pan over a medium high heat. Add your vegetable oil for frying.
